notes: Grindare Studio intro replaces the Godot boot logo (geometric neon, 'WHERE GRIND NEVER ENDS' tagline, click-to-skip). Profile sidebar avatar now uses the same chevron ship as the skill tree + in-match player so all three match. Launcher 0.1.9 reliably self-updates with verbose logging.
launcher_notes: Self-update overhaul. Windows uses copy+del instead of move (Defender-friendly), retries up to 24s for the file lock, logs every step to %TEMP%\pulsewave_launcher_update.log. Download size sanity check >= 5MB. Live download progress (X / Y MB).
